free_text: Production of 41Ca and K, Sc and V short-lived isotopes
by the irradiation of Ti with 35 to 150 MeV protons:
applications to solar cosmic ray studies
Incident beam energy and width determined by measuring
proton range curve in aluminium.  Reductions in energy
to desired incident energies were achieved by
introduction of polystyrene, and combinations of Lexan
and lead degraders of accurately known thicknesses.
